properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: To the work, to the work We are servants of God Let us follow the path that our Master has trod With the balm of His counsel our strength to renew Let us do with our might what our hands find to do

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Toiling on, toiling on Let us hope, let us watch And labor till the master comes

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To the work, to the work Let the hungry be fed, to the fountain of life let the weary be led In the cross and its banner our glory shall be While we herald the tidings salvation is free

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: To the work, to the work There is labor for all For the kingdom of darkness and error shall fall And the name of jehovah exalted shall be In the loud swelling chorus salvation is free
